notes: Curated wheat source seeds (WS-6). Migrated out of config/runs/pilot-global-wheat.json with verified scope, source quality, and caveats. The UNL G2122 caveat is the motivating example: it covers N/P/S only, not seeding rate.

seeds.title: Wheat Production Handbook - Kansas State University Extension
seeds.snippet: K-State Research and Extension wheat production handbook covering planting, fertility, growth, and harvest management.
seeds.verified_scope: Comprehensive production handbook; broad but US Great Plains-centric agronomy.
caveats: Rates and dates are calibrated to Kansas/Great Plains conditions.

seeds.title: Wheat Production Guide - South Dakota State University Extension
seeds.snippet: SDSU Extension wheat guide with seeding rate, planting date, fertility, and frost management guidance.
seeds.verified_scope: Northern Plains wheat establishment and fertility guidance.

seeds.title: Fertilizing Winter Wheat - Nebraska Extension (G2122)
seeds.snippet: Nebraska Extension winter wheat fertility guide for nitrogen, phosphorus, and sulfur recommendations.
seeds.verified_scope: Winter wheat macronutrient fertility (N, P, S) only.
caveats: Covers N/P/S fertility ONLY — do NOT map to seeding rate or planting date (the original run-config seed mismatch).

seeds.title: Managing Soil pH - Oregon State University Extension
seeds.snippet: OSU Extension soil pH and acidity management guide relevant to wheat soil suitability.
seeds.verified_scope: General soil pH/acidity management; not wheat-specific but applicable to wheat soil suitability.
caveats: Not wheat-specific; soil pH guidance is general.

seeds.title: Wheat - Michigan State University Extension
seeds.snippet: MSU Extension wheat production resources covering planting timing and nitrogen management.
seeds.verified_scope: Landing hub for MSU wheat resources; some content behind further links.
caveats: Landing page — primary values may live on linked sub-pages.

seeds.title: Wheat - Nebraska CropWatch
seeds.snippet: Nebraska CropWatch wheat agronomy with growth, planting, and irrigation guidance.
caveats: Landing page — primary values may live on linked sub-pages.

seeds.title: Crop Information: Wheat - FAO Land & Water
seeds.snippet: FAO crop water information for wheat including evapotranspiration, crop coefficients, and water requirements.
seeds.verified_scope: Authoritative global crop water requirements (Kc, ETc, depletion) for wheat.

seeds.title: Irrigation Water Management: Wheat - FAO
seeds.snippet: FAO irrigation water management reference covering wheat water use, crop coefficients, and sensitive stages.
seeds.verified_scope: FAO irrigation water management; wheat water use and sensitive stages.

seeds.title: Wheat Research - CIMMYT
seeds.snippet: CIMMYT wheat research on heat and drought tolerance, vernalization, and stress-adaptive physiology.
seeds.verified_scope: CIMMYT wheat stress physiology research hub.
caveats: Research landing page — links out to specific studies.

seeds.title: Wheat Growth Guide - AHDB
seeds.snippet: AHDB wheat growth guide covering growth stages, thermal time, tillering, and canopy development benchmarks.
seeds.verified_scope: Authoritative UK wheat growth-stage and thermal-time benchmarks (Zadoks).
caveats: UK cultivars/conditions; thermal-time benchmarks are region-calibrated.
